description: Add task statuses for pending, in progress, and done work.

userStories.title: Adding task status storage
userStories.description: As a product user, I want each task to store a status so that work can be tracked consistently.
acceptanceCriteria: Task records persist a status field with allowed values pending, in-progress, and done.
Existing tasks without a stored status resolve to pending.
Typecheck passes
Tests pass

userStories.title: Updating task status from the list
userStories.description: As a product user, I want to change a task status from the task list so that progress stays current.
acceptanceCriteria: Changing a task status persists the selected value.
Invalid status values are rejected.
Typecheck passes
Tests pass

userStories.title: Showing task status badges
userStories.description: As a product user, I want task cards to show the current status badge so that I can scan work state quickly.
acceptanceCriteria: Task cards render the current status badge for pending, in-progress, and done.
Badge text matches the stored status.
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill

userStories.title: Adding task status controls
userStories.description: As a product user, I want status controls in the task list so that I can change work state without leaving the list.
acceptanceCriteria: The task list exposes controls for pending, in-progress, and done.
Selecting a control updates the task status.
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill

userStories.title: Filtering tasks by status
userStories.description: As a product user, I want to filter the task list by status so that I can focus on one work state at a time.
acceptanceCriteria: The list can filter to pending, in-progress, done, or all tasks.
Filter state updates the visible task set without changing stored statuses.
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill
